item.name: Shipwreck's Sail
item.description:
This wavekin is so broad and flat that it has been compared to the sail of a ship left to float on the tide. In actuality, it is waiting for seabirds to pick the parasites from its flanks.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: A common story heard in the taverns of port towns is one in which a helmsman spots the sail of a wrecked ship on the horizon. Whether driven by greed or compassion, the captain then orders the crew to change course to the direction of the sighting. However, not several malms from their destination, all eyes lose sight of the sail, and any ship it may have been part of.
